remarks: Cozy & Bright 2-Bedroom Apartment with Private Deck! Welcome home to this charming, beautifully updated 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom rental, offering the perfect blend of privacy, comfort, and style. Step through your own private entrance into a welcoming home, or head straight out to your private deck-perfect for morning coffee or evening relaxation overlooking a peaceful backyard. Features two good sized bedrooms with excellent natural light. Bright Living Spaces: Enjoy beautiful hardwood floors that run seamlessly throughout the entire apartment, adding warmth and classic charm. Eat-In Kitchen: The cozy, functional small eat-in kitchen comes equipped with a designated eat-in dining area, making meal prep and casual dining a breeze. Relax and unwind in a clean, bright full bathroom complete with a soaking tub and shower. Energy-Efficient Upgrades: Newly installed, brand-new energy-efficient blinds are fitted throughout the home to help keep your utility costs low and your privacy high. Ready to see it in person? Contact me today to schedule your private tour. This quiet, light-filled gem won't last long! Very quiet neighborhood. Close to 95, Stamford Downtown and the Train Station.
